messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Monitoring. Provide technical guidance on metrics, alarms, and notifications.
Como criar monitoring no compartment production?

Para configurar Observability no OCI:

**Via CLI:**
```bash
# Criar Log Group
oci logging log-group create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "production-log-group"

# Criar alarm
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "high-cpu-production" \
  --is-enabled true \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --metric-name CpuUtilization \
  --statistic MAX \
  --interval 5m \
  --threshold 85 \
  --pending-duration PT5M \
  --severity CRITICAL \
  --destinations '[{"serviceType": "ONS", "topicId": "<topic-ocid>"}]'
```

[MUTABLE] Custos de ingestão variam por volume.

```bash
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
```
```bash
  --display-name "sandbox-log-group"

# Criar alarm
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "high-cpu-sandbox" \
  --is-enabled true \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --metric-name CpuUtilization \
  --statistic MAX \
  --interval 5m \
  --threshold 85 \
  --pending-duration PT5M \
  --severity CRITICAL \
  --destinations '[{"serviceType": "ONS", "topicId": "<topic-ocid>"}]'
```
